titles.text: ドラゴンボール 大魔王復活
ドラゴンボール大魔王復活

descriptions.text:
これは人気漫画シリーズ「ドラゴンボール」を基にしたアドベンチャー/RPGゲームです。物語はシリーズのエピソードの一つに基づいています。孫悟空の友人クリリンが格闘大会の後に死んでいるのが発見されます。遺体の近くには悪魔のシンボルが刻まれたメモが残されています。亀仙人は、悪の魔物ピッコロ大魔王が再び地球に現れたと言います。孫悟空がピッコロを見つけ、友人を復活させることが求められます。

このゲームは、後に「ドラゴンボールZ RPG」シリーズで使用されるカードRPGの概念を導入しています。ゲーム内でのすべての動きは、画面下部に表示されるカードの選択に依存します。適切な数字のカードを選ぶことで移動し、マス目の上を進むことができます。バトルでは、攻撃と防御のカードを選択し、戦闘の結果を決定します。師匠とトレーニングをしたり、さまざまな場所を訪れたり、「日本の冒険」スタイルで環境を探索したりすることができます。

Dragon Ball: Daimaou Fukkatsu is a role playing video game released only in Japan by Bandai on August 12, 1988. It is the second Dragon Ball video game released for the Nintendo Famicom.

Daimaō Fukkatsu is the first role playing game based on the Dragon Ball series. Its gameplay was reused in the Goku-den video game series. Daimaou Fukkatsu is also one of the games included in the game compilation J Legend Retsuden for Nintendo 3DS.

Daimaō Fukkatsu takes place during the King Piccolo Saga, but instead of being killed at the World Martial Arts Tournament, Krillin is killed at Kame House, where the adventure begins. After a confrontation with Tambourine, Goku goes to West City in order to get the Dragon Radar from Bulma, and then in the Southern Transformation Kindergarten to find Oolong and Puar. After defeating the demons who took his friends' places at school, Goku heads to Jingle Village to find the Dragon Balls, meets Android 8 in the Muscle Tower, defeats the Pilaf Gang who is also on a quest for the Dragon Balls, and finds the Two-Star Ball. After getting a submarine at Kame House, Goku and his friends go the Pirate Cave, where he defeats the demon Banjo and finds the Three-Star Ball, but it is stolen by Mercenary Tao. After defeating Tao in the Pirate Cave, go visits Fortuneteller Baba, who gives him the location of two Dragon Balls in Pilaf's Castle. Goku defeats the Pilaf Machine once again, and finds the Six-Star and Four-Star Balls in the castle. He goes to the Sacred Land of Korin, where he meets members of the Crane School, as well as Bora and Upa, defeats Master Shen, gets the Seven-Star Ball, and meets Korin on top of the Korin Tower.

At Penguin Village, Goku meets Arale Norimaki, Gatchan, Senbei Norimaki and Yajirobe, he defeats Monster Carrot in the Penguin Village High School, the demon Cymbal, and the alien Synthesizer, and he finds the One-Star and Five-Star Balls. With the seven Dragon Balls, Goku summons Shenron to get a path to the Remote Land of Konpei, where he meets Lord Konpei, who opens a way to Piccolo's Mansion. In Piccolo's Mansion, Goku meets Organ and defeats Drum, he meets the ghost of Krillin, and then he destroys the mansion. Finally, Goku heads to the Dark Castle and defeats King Piccolo. The game ends with NBS News announcing the end of King Piccolo.
